title: TrustBridge Rule of Law Foundation is looking to hire a senior research fellow in Delhi
description: TrustBridge Rule of Law Foundation is looking hire a senior research fellow (legal) in Delhi.Number of Positions: 1 (One)PQE: 4-6 yearsLocation: DelhiQualification: Masters in Law/ Policy/ PhDJob DescriptionThe Senior Fellow will contribute to the TrustBridge’s ADR Policy Research initiative, with a clear emphasis on rigorous policy research.
